text: convenience feature: shift enter to add another parent aim / containing phase in the parent aim / containing phase modals after aim creation.

reflections.context: Implement Shift+Enter as an additive keyboard shortcut for parent aim and containing phase picker flows so users can select one item and immediately continue adding another.
reflections.outcome: Added an optional keepOpen flag to aim and phase search selection payloads, set it only from Shift+Enter keyboard activation, and made app-level modal close handlers respect the flag. Normal Enter and click behavior still close. Added focused modal tests and app-level keep-open tests.
reflections.effectiveness: The shared payload approach avoided duplicating logic in individual add-parent/add-phase callers and covered both modal-local and app-level close paths. Type-check and the full frontend unit suite pass.
reflections.lesson: For modal keyboard shortcuts, test both the component that emits the selection and the app shell that owns modal visibility; otherwise a local keep-open event can still be immediately closed by the parent handler.
reflections.pattern: Propagating explicit intent metadata through existing events is a low-churn way to add modal workflow variants while preserving default behavior.

status.comment: Implemented Shift+Enter keep-open selection for aim and phase search modals, preserving normal Enter close behavior; added focused modal and app-level regression tests. Verified with frontend type-check and full frontend unit suite.
